name: Cranberry Fruit Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the gelatin in boiling water.
2. Break up and stir in the cranberry sauce, undrained pineapple, orange juice, lemon juice, and nuts.
3. Pour into a shallow casserole dish.
4. Chill until firm.
5. Cut into squares and serve on lettuce leaves with salad dressing.
From "Make It Better with CRANBERRIES" Cape Cod Cranberry Growers' Association, Founded 1888 P.O. Box 270 Carver, MA 02330
